ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_AUTO_PLAY.descr: When drawn, automatically play this card for free.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_AUTO_PLAY.title: Swift
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_KWSEACREATURE.d:
Upon entering this form, lose 5 HP.
Attacks apply 2 [blue]Neural Damage[/blue].
Take 25% more damage and deal 50% more damage.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_KWHUMAN.title: Human
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_KWHUMAN.descrip:
Upon entering this form, gain 2 Energy and 1 [blue]Stealth[/blue].
Draw 3 cards and [green]heal[/green] 6 HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO1.title: Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO1.descripti: While this card is in your hand, playing another card reduces its [gold]Echo[/gold] counter. At 0, the indicated value increases by 1 and the counter resets.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO2.title: Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO2.descripti: While this card is in your hand, playing another card reduces its [gold]Echo[/gold] counter. At 0, the indicated value increases by 1 and the counter resets.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO3.title: Echo
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ECHO3.descripti: While this card is in your hand, playing another card reduces its [gold]Echo[/gold] counter. At 0, the indicated value increases by 1 and the counter resets.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_SPUTTER.title: Splash
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_SPUTTER.descrip: Deal 50% of the attack's damage to all enemies other than the target.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER1.title: Drift
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER1.descri: Summon a [gold]Floating Sea Drifter[/gold]. If one already exists, give it that much [blue]Seabornization[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER2.title: Harvest
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER2.descri: Summon a [gold]Basin Sea Reaper[/gold]. If one already exists, give it that much [blue]Seabornization[/blue].
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER1DES.des:
Once per turn, click to give an ally [blue]3[/blue] Block.
After acting, it loses [blue]1[/blue] HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_MONSTER2DES.des:
Once per turn, click to deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to ALL enemies [blue]2[/blue] times.
After acting, it loses [blue]1[/blue] HP.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_TANDI.title: Dredge
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_TANDI.descripti: Look at a number of cards from the bottom of your draw pile. Add 1 to your hand and put the rest into your discard pile.
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ALLME.title: Collective Self
ARKNIGHTS_MIZUKI_KEYWORD_ALLME.descripti:
During each combat, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies for every 5 cards you play.
Gain 1 Energy for every 10 cards you play.
